# Nivana sorceress isolation

Priority: Medium

One of the core appeals of the [Nivana sorceress arc](../../TWOLD%20Plot/Arcs/Nivana%20sorceress%20arc%20ba9bd93692634691a49a337080acf339.md) is the isolation, but that has disconnected that arc from the rest of the story.

That wouldn’t be a problem if that was the whole story.

However, the more I work on the story, the more new and better tales I am uncovering, and the original Nivana arc is paling in comparison.

<aside>
💡

Maybe it’s time to Review the Nivana arc again.

</aside>
